rule.signal: SPY adjusted close > 100-day simple moving average of SPY adjusted close
rule.execution: If signal changes, execute at next trading day open (T+1)
rule.cash_instrument: BIL (SPDR Bloomberg 1-3 Month T-Bill) or money market
rule.position_sizing: 100% UPRO when signal=1, 100% BIL when signal=0

historical_performance.source: Real UPRO adjusted close from yfinance

caveats: All real LETF data is post-GFC (2009+) — no real-product bear market test
Synthetic 3x SPY SMA100 from 1998 shows negative pre-2013 CAGR under conservative costs
Weekly frequency selected in-sample (not walk-forward validated)
Strategy has ~11 switches/year, 99% short-term gains — requires tax-deferred account
3x leverage overshoots Kelly-optimal (1.9x for SPY) — accepting excess risk for CAGR
